coverage_page.intro: Coverage & efficiency view per product and Geographical Area. Tot sites comes from the per-site coverage table; Coverage % vol is the mean site coverage % in that product and area; Estimated volume is the current-YTD Pieces from the main DB; Low / Mid / High is the share of sites in each Automation tier.
coverage_page.wip_status: Built from the per-site coverage_galileo table.
